channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump immunity from IRS audit shocks experts, who warn it could undermine trust in tax system
item.description: Donald Trump has a reputation for slashing his taxes using techniques that some experts find aggressive.

item.title: Pushed to the limit, Republicans show rare defiance to Trump’s demands
Blanche at center of Republican firestorm over $1.8B fund as he seeks to prove his loyalty to Trump
